sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7963" key="a)ndro/gamos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνδρό-γαμος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n7963.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κίναιδος</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.175</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
